2342580.name: Ettrian - The Elf Prince Demo
2342580.description:
Ettrian - The Elf Prince is a turn-based RPG set in the magical world of Yumhia. Step into the shoes of Ettrian, a 14-year-old elf prince grappling with betrayal from his own human siblings, even though they are part of the royal family of Atlantus, ruled by King Tularic.


This demo cuts some of the initial dialogues, resulting in more direct gameplay without having to wait for dialogues.
Here, the player gets an idea of the battle system, exploration, what each button on the controller or keyboard can do, among other basic features.
The Ethereum Nexus grid system is not available in the demo. It's only in the main version, which is in early access. If this somehow serves as a challenge to train your abilities in the game without skills, consider it.
2342580.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
